NCT00291330.name: RE-COVER
NCT00291330.group: Dabigatran 150 mg BID (after LMWH lead-in) | DOAC (acute VTE 6 mo; vs LMWH -> Warfarin INR 2-3; RE-COVER)

allOutcomes.title: Recurrent VTE or VTE-related death at 6 mo dabigatran vs warfarin (RE-COVER primary non-inferiority)

NCT00291330.snippet: Schulman S et al. NEJM 2009;361:2342-2352 (RE-COVER). First DOAC in VTE treatment; non-inferior (not superior).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion criteria~1. Acute deep vein thrombosis (DVT) of the leg involving proximal veins, and/or pulmonary embolism (PE) iin patients for whom at least 6 months of anticoagulant therapy is considered appropriate~2. Male or female, being 18 years of age or older~3. Written informed consent for study participation~Exclusion criteria~1. Overt symptoms of VTE for longer than 2 weeks prior to enrolment~2. PE satisfying at least one of the following criteria: Haemodynamic instability, embolectomy i...

NCT00440193.name: EINSTEIN-DVT
NCT00440193.group: Rivaroxaban 15 mg BID x 21 d then 20 mg daily | DOAC (acute DVT; vs Enoxaparin -> Warfarin INR 2-3; EINSTEIN-DVT 3-6-12 mo)

allOutcomes.title: Recurrent VTE rivaroxaban vs enoxaparin/warfarin (EINSTEIN-DVT primary non-inferiority)

NCT00440193.snippet: Bauersachs R et al. NEJM 2010;363:2499-2510 (EINSTEIN-DVT). First single-drug approach (no heparin lead-in).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Confirmed acute symptomatic proximal DVT without symptomatic PE~Exclusion Criteria:~* Legal lower age limitations (country specific)~* Thrombectomy, insertion of a caval filter, or use of a fibrinolytic agent to treat the current episode of DVT and/or PE~* Other indication for VKA than DVT and/or PE~* The pre-randomization anti-coagulant treatment (Criteria # 4) has been prolonged from 36 hours to a maximum of 48 hours."

NCT00643201.name: AMPLIFY
NCT00643201.group: Apixaban 10 mg BID x 7 d then 5 mg BID | DOAC (acute VTE; vs Enoxaparin -> Warfarin INR 2-3; AMPLIFY 6 mo)

allOutcomes.title: Recurrent VTE or VTE-related death apixaban vs enoxaparin/warfarin (AMPLIFY primary non-inferiority)

NCT00643201.snippet: Agnelli G et al. NEJM 2013;369:799-808 (AMPLIFY). Apixaban single-drug; major bleeding significantly reduced vs warfarin.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Men and women ≥ 18 years of age~* Clinical diagnosis of DVT or PE~Exclusion Criteria:~* Contraindications for enoxaparin or warfarin~* Active bleeding or high risk for serious bleeding~* Short life expectancy~* Uncontrolled high blood pressure~* Significantly impaired kidney or liver function"

NCT00986154.name: HOKUSAI-VTE
NCT00986154.group: Edoxaban 60 mg daily (after LMWH lead-in) | DOAC (acute VTE; vs LMWH -> Warfarin INR 2-3; HOKUSAI-VTE 12 mo)

allOutcomes.title: Recurrent VTE or VTE-related death at 12 mo edoxaban vs warfarin (HOKUSAI-VTE primary non-inferiority)

NCT00986154.snippet: Buller HR et al. NEJM 2013;369:1406-1415 (HOKUSAI-VTE). Largest VTE-treatment DOAC trial; LMWH lead-in required.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Male or female subjects older than the minimum legal adult age (country specific);~* Acute symptomatic proximal DVT and/or symptomatic PE confirmed at the site by appropriate diagnostic imaging;~* Able to provide written informed consent~Exclusion Criteria:~* thrombectomy, insertion of a caval filter, or use of a fibrinolytic agent to treat the current episode of DVT and/or PE;~* More than 48 hours pre-treatment with anticoagulant therapy prior to randomization;~* Calculat...

NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: Recurrent VTE or VTE-related death (trial-primary composite)
NMA_CONFIG.note: k=4 DOAC-vs-LMWH/Warfarin pivotal treatment trials. Star through LMWHWarfarin (the classical active comparator). All non-inferiority-powered; expected to show equivalent or modestly better recurrent-VTE prevention.

title: RapidMeta Cardiology | DOAC Class NMA vs Warfarin for Acute VTE Treatment v1.0
